places.name: The Neon Museum
places.description: Flashy signs from Las Vegas’s past find their final resting place at this unusual graveyard.

places.name: Atomic Museum
places.description: Stepping away from the glitz of mobsters and casinos to learn about the other history of Vegas.

places.name: Pinball Hall of Fame
places.description: This incredible collection of vintage pinball machines can be played at 25 cents a pop.

places.name: Art-o-mat
places.description: These banned cigarette vending machines now sell little pieces of pocket-sized art.

places.name: Frankie's Tiki Room
places.description: The best Tiki bar in Las Vegas.

places.name: Red Rock Canyon National Conservation Area
places.description: Dyed by iron oxide over centuries, these sandstone rocks rise thousands of feet into the sky.

places.name: Erotic Heritage Museum
places.description: Thousands of artifacts relating to human sexuality, including the world's largest sex bike.

places.name: Atomic Liquors
places.description: Back in 1952, you could get a mushroom cloud chaser with your atomic cocktail.

places.name: Evel Pie
places.description: “Live hard, ride fast, eat pizza” at this joint filled with Evel Knievel memorabilia.
